description: Create pyproject.toml with proper packaging metadata, Python version requirement (>=3.10), add a tests/ directory with unit tests for the concept engine and eval system, and run the v4 diagnostic eval runner to refresh results.
steps: Step 1: Create pyproject.toml at the project root (/projects/sandbox/sia/pyproject.toml) with: [project] name='virtual-sia', version='0.1.0', requires-python='>=3.10', description from the Decision Memo, [project.optional-dependencies] dev=['pytest>=7.0']. Use [build-system] requires=['setuptools>=68']. Add [tool.pytest.ini_options] testpaths=['tests'].

Step 2: Create tests/__init__.py and tests/test_concept_engine.py with pytest tests covering: (a) select_applicable_concepts returns empty list when no concepts match family, (b) select_applicable_concepts respects family-specific max_active limits, (c) select_applicable_concepts applies redundancy penalty, (d) _family_policy returns correct values for each family from DEFAULT_FAMILY_SELECTIVITY, (e) build_contrastive_groups correctly groups memories by family. Use the actual data objects from virtual_genesis.core.objects.

Step 3: Create tests/test_eval_runners.py with tests covering: (a) run_condition imports and CONDITIONS dict has expected keys, (b) compare_conditions returns dict keyed by condition_id, (c) summarize_comparison produces thesis_signals keys. These should be lightweight - test the plumbing not the full eval run.

Step 4: Create tests/test_task_ingress.py with tests covering: (a) ingest_task with raw string produces TaskObject with classified family, (b) ingest_task with TaskCase object preserves expected_primary_family in meta, (c) classify_task_family correctly classifies known prompts.

Step 5: Run the v4 diagnostic eval: ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python -m virtual_genesis.eval.runners.run_local_eval_v4 to regenerate virtual_genesis/eval/results/prototype_v4_summary.json with the latest code.
Step 6: Run pytest to verify all new tests pass: ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -v
acceptance_criteria: pyproject.toml exists at project root with requires-python = '>=3.10'
Running `~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -v` passes all tests with 0 failures
tests/test_concept_engine.py has at least 5 test functions
tests/test_eval_runners.py has at least 3 test functions
tests/test_task_ingress.py has at least 3 test functions
findings: All 11 tests pass. pytest installed via pip. v4 eval regenerated successfully (match_rate=0.667, top2_match_rate=0.917). The prototype_v4_summary.json was already tracked so only modified. No issues encountered.
